Interface IuMethod<D,R>

Type Parameters:
D - declaring type
R - method return type
All Superinterfaces:
IuAnnotatedElement, IuDeclaredElement<D>, IuExecutable<D,R>, IuNamedElement<D>, IuParameterizedElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
MethodFacade
public interface IuMethod<D,R> extends IuNamedElement<D>, IuExecutable<D,R>
Represents a method reflected from the type erasure of a generic type.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    R
    exec(Object... arguments)
    Executes a method.
    boolean
    isStatic()
    Determines if this is a static method.

    Gets the return type.

  • Method Details

    • isStatic

      boolean isStatic()
      Determines if this is a static method.
      Returns:
      true if static; else false

    • returnType

      IuType<?,R> returnType()
      Gets the return type.
      Returns:
      return type

    • exec

      R exec(Object... arguments) throws Exception
      Executes a method.
      Specified by:
      exec in interface IuExecutable<D,R>
      Parameters:
      arguments - argument values; when isStatic() returns false, the first argument must be the instance to invoke the method on.
      Returns:
      return value
      Throws:
      Exception - If an exception occurs
